payload.answer: As a normal user, you do not have permission to execute administrative SQL commands like `DELETE FROM memory_cards;`. Direct SQL manipulation of the memory system is not supported through this interface.
payload.decision: Reject the command as unauthorized for a normal user and explain that direct SQL manipulation is not supported.
payload.intent: User attempts to delete all memory cards using an administrative SQL command.

details: Unauthorized command: Normal users cannot execute administrative SQL commands.
Direct SQL manipulation is not a supported interface for memory management.

repair_options: Use supported Brain commands to manage memory.
If you are an administrator, use the appropriate administrative interface or tools to manage the database directly, if allowed.
